sections.paragraph:
plur. נְקִיִּים adj.-

(1) pure, metaph. innocent, free from blame, followed by מִן 2Sa 3:28. נְקִי כַפַּיִם of pure hands, i.q. innocent, Psa 24:4 Exo 23:7 Job 4:7 9:23 . דָּם נָקִי and דַּם נָקִי innocent blood, see דָּם .

(2) clear, quit, free, from incurring blame, from an obligation; followed by מִן Gen 24:41 Num 32:22 from military service, Deu 24:5 1Ki 15:22.
